title: Ghost In The Machines

jokes.text: As long as nothing happens for the next 15 minutes, our insurance will be reinstated. So, let's just sit quietly and run out the clock.
jokes.setup: Character announces a plan to avoid danger for insurance purposes
jokes.punchline: Immediately sets up the expectation that something will definitely go wrong
jokes.explanation: Classic setup for disaster - good dramatic irony and economy

jokes.text: A giant sausage!
jokes.setup: Character spots parade balloon
jokes.punchline: Panicked reaction to harmless parade float misidentified as threatening sausage
jokes.explanation: Good visual comedy setup with economy - Fry's characteristic overreaction

jokes.text: Oh, God, no! Get out of here, you horrific sausage!
jokes.setup: Continuation of sausage panic
jokes.punchline: Dramatically addressing a balloon as if it's a monster
jokes.explanation: Strong escalation and absurd language - 'horrific sausage' is memorable

jokes.text: Those were dark times.
jokes.setup: Describing having a parade every day
jokes.punchline: Treating daily parades as a historical tragedy
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan delivery and economy - treats parades as apocalyptic with complete seriousness

jokes.text: No, that's just the Jamaican Pride float.
jokes.setup: Someone comments on fog rolling in
jokes.punchline: Reveals the 'fog' is actually marijuana smoke from a parade float
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection with cultural reference that works without being cheap

jokes.text: Oh, no! It's within munching distance of the Doritos float!
jokes.setup: Jamaican float is speeding up
jokes.punchline: Treating proximity to snack food as an emergency due to munchies
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the marijuana joke with logical absurdity

jokes.text: Kif, you're slacking off on my waving arm.
jokes.setup: Zapp is in a parade
jokes.punchline: Making his assistant do his waving for him
jokes.explanation: Perfect Zapp characterization - his laziness and ego combined absurdly

jokes.text: Thanks. I have another one that says 'Paleontologists Do It In The Dirt.' I'm a paleontologist.
jokes.setup: Nerd complimented on his shirt
jokes.punchline: Double entendre t-shirt joke with earnest professional identification
jokes.explanation: Standard double entendre joke but well-executed with character detail

jokes.text: Oh, honey, I dig you so much.
jokes.setup: Wife responds to husband's paleontology revelation
jokes.punchline: Continues the digging puns in romantic context
jokes.explanation: Nice callback that extends the pun sequence economically

jokes.text: This one's for the deadbolt, this is for the top lock. I think this one's for the knob. The city's in a bad neighborhood.
jokes.setup: Presenting ceremonial keys to the city
jokes.punchline: Multiple locks needed because the city is in a dangerous area
jokes.explanation: Clever subversion of ceremonial tradition with practical reality

jokes.text: Heroes don't do drugs. Except for Drugman, I guess.
jokes.setup: Standard anti-drug message
jokes.punchline: Immediately contradicts with made-up superhero exception
jokes.explanation: Great Fry logic - starts with PSA then immediately finds exception. 'Drugman' is absurdly funny.

jokes.text: Heroes don't do drugs. Except for Drugman, I guess.
jokes.setup: Fry giving heroic speech
jokes.punchline: Undermines anti-drug message with fictional drug-using superhero
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection that subverts PSA format with Fry's typical confusion

jokes.text: It sure was nice of the mayor's wife to have sex with me.
jokes.setup: Fry reflecting on his hero treatment
jokes.punchline: Casually mentions inappropriate reward from mayor's wife
jokes.explanation: Shocking casual delivery of inappropriate information - perfect Fry moment

jokes.text: Do you think human life is more precious than robot life?
jokes.setup: Bender confronts Fry about saving the human
jokes.punchline: Forces Fry into philosophical dilemma about species worth
jokes.explanation: Sets up the episode's central conflict with perfect Bender jealousy

jokes.text: Bender, you always say you're going to kill yourself, but you almost never do.
jokes.setup: Bender threatens suicide
jokes.punchline: Treats his suicide threats as routine occurrence with 'almost never'
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan treatment of dark subject with 'almost never' qualifier

jokes.text: Yeah. Last time you went to the suicide booth, you ended up dating it for six months.
jokes.setup: Building on Bender's failed suicide attempts
jokes.punchline: He formed romantic relationship with suicide machine
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurd escalation that's perfectly in character for Bender

jokes.text: How is Lynn, by the way?
jokes.setup: Continuing suicide booth relationship topic
jokes.punchline: Treating the machine as an ex-girlfriend with a name
jokes.explanation: Good callback that humanizes the absurd relationship

jokes.text: Living in Oregon with her crazy mother.
jokes.setup: Question about suicide machine's wellbeing
jokes.punchline: Continues treating machine like real person with family drama
jokes.explanation: Excellent commitment to the absurd premise with realistic relationship details

jokes.text: Fat, but great.
jokes.setup: Bender sees Lynn (suicide booth) again
jokes.punchline: Backhanded compliment to ex-girlfriend who's a machine
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender insensitivity with great economy

jokes.text: My mom tried to commit suicide in me. I don't want to talk about it.
jokes.setup: Explaining why she left Oregon
jokes.punchline: Her mother attempted suicide using her (a suicide machine)
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly dark and original - suicide machine family dysfunction

jokes.text: Everyone, put on your taking-off caps.
jokes.setup: Announcing Bender's death
jokes.punchline: Opposite of 'putting on caps' as respect ritual
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay that inverts funeral traditions

jokes.text: It's a sign of respect, you savage!
jokes.setup: Explaining the taking-off caps tradition
jokes.punchline: Aggressively defending made-up funeral custom
jokes.explanation: Good escalation that treats absurd custom as sacred tradition

jokes.text: Look at that loser getting garbage dumped in him. Glad I'm not him, whoever he is.
jokes.setup: Bender sees his body being used as trash can
jokes.punchline: Doesn't recognize his own body and insults himself
jokes.explanation: Perfect irony - ghost Bender unknowingly insulting his own corpse

jokes.text: Just don't pick his nose! Ha, ha, ha, ha.
jokes.setup: Discussing picking Bender's body parts
jokes.punchline: Pun on 'picking nose' in literal body part context
jokes.explanation: Obvious pun with forced delivery - fairly weak comedy

jokes.text: What's wrong with you guys? This is comedy gold.
jokes.setup: No one laughs at his pun
jokes.punchline: Defensively claims his bad joke is brilliant
jokes.explanation: Good meta-joke about bad comedy - salvages the weak pun

jokes.text: Hey, dip-schlitz, that's not me. I'm right here. Hello?
jokes.setup: Friends mourning over wrong body
jokes.punchline: Ghost Bender's frustrated attempts to get attention
jokes.explanation: Good ghost frustration comedy with Bender's characteristic insults

jokes.text: What? I thought I just had laryngitis and antigravity.
jokes.setup: Robot Devil tells Bender he's dead
jokes.punchline: Bender's misdiagnosis includes made-up 'antigravity' condition
jokes.explanation: Good absurd medical misunderstanding with sci-fi twist

jokes.text: Adoy. Wait. Adoy?
jokes.setup: Robot Devil explains Bender's ghost status
jokes.punchline: Bender questions his own nonsense word
jokes.explanation: Bender's self-awareness about his own verbal tics

jokes.text: They still stink of candy corn.
jokes.setup: Robot Devil mentions trading hands with Fry
jokes.punchline: Disgusted by lingering human smell on his hands
jokes.explanation: Good callback with specific disgusting detail that rings true

jokes.text: I'm not stupid. So, yes, absolutely.
jokes.setup: Robot Devil asks if he wants to make a deal
jokes.punchline: Claims not to be stupid while immediately agreeing to obvious trap
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender logic - confident stupidity delivered with great timing

jokes.text: I like that there's no catch this time.
jokes.setup: Bender accepting the devil's deal
jokes.punchline: Naively believes there's no catch in a deal with the devil
jokes.explanation: Good ironic setup for the inevitable catch revelation

jokes.text: Maybe he'll die if I rub him all over with it, real slow.
jokes.setup: Bender trying to scare Fry with soap
jokes.punchline: Suggests killing through inappropriate soap application
jokes.explanation: Darkly funny with uncomfortable implications - good character work

jokes.text: No! Not the armpits! Winter's coming!
jokes.setup: Fry being attacked by washing machine
jokes.punchline: Panicked about armpit washing due to seasonal hair growth
jokes.explanation: Good absurd panic with specific gross-out detail

jokes.text: Since Bender's death, requests to bite one's shiny metal ass are down 98%.
jokes.setup: Presenting workplace statistics
jokes.punchline: Quantifies Bender's signature insult as measurable workplace metric
jokes.explanation: Brilliant callback that treats Bender's insults as quantifiable business metric

jokes.text: Whoa, maybe you're right. I only meant to slap you twice.
jokes.setup: Relaxation balls attacking Fry repeatedly
jokes.punchline: Leela's casual admission of intentional violence
jokes.explanation: Casual admission of planned violence with matter-of-fact delivery

jokes.text: The number you have dialed has been lame since 1989.
jokes.setup: Fry tries to call Ghostbusters
jokes.punchline: Phone system mocks the dated reference
jokes.explanation: Smart meta-joke that acknowledges its own dated reference

jokes.text: I said science!
jokes.setup: Professor insists on scientific explanation then seance begins
jokes.punchline: Exasperated reaction to immediate contradiction of his request
jokes.explanation: Good reaction beat showing Professor's frustration with unscientific methods

jokes.text: I'm rich.
jokes.setup: Claims to be sensing something spiritual
jokes.punchline: Reveals she's just realizing she's being paid
jokes.explanation: Great misdirection with perfect economy - subverts spiritual expectations

jokes.text: There's no such thing as ghosts, you donkey-monkey.
jokes.setup: Dismissing ghost claims
jokes.punchline: Creative compound insult combines two harmless animals
jokes.explanation: Fun creative insult though not particularly sophisticated

jokes.text: Me, dumbass. Bender, Bender, Bender, Bender!
jokes.setup: Fry asks what robot would haunt him
jokes.punchline: Ghost Bender desperately trying to communicate his identity
jokes.explanation: Good frustration comedy with Bender's typical directness

jokes.text: Oh, lord. I got the too-much-macaroni sweats.
jokes.setup: At the buffet during exorcism
jokes.punchline: Specific ridiculous food-related medical condition
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly specific absurd condition that's perfectly Scruffy

jokes.text: It also keeps cats off the sofa by killing 'em.
jokes.setup: Describing protective device's features
jokes.punchline: Casually mentions lethal side effect as feature
jokes.explanation: Dark humor delivered casually - good escalation of device's capabilities

jokes.text: Damn you, Obama-care!
jokes.setup: Fry survived heart attack
jokes.punchline: Blames healthcare reform for keeping target alive
jokes.explanation: Topical reference that works but relies on contemporary politics

jokes.text: Not helping him.
jokes.setup: Doctor mentions her cleavage isn't helping patient
jokes.punchline: Clarifies she meant not helping HIM specifically
jokes.explanation: Good clarification joke with subtle inappropriate humor

jokes.text: That's the closest thing to 'Bender is great' that anyone besides me has ever said.
jokes.setup: Fry says robot life can be valuable when it's your best friend
jokes.punchline: Bender interprets this as the highest praise he's ever received
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender ego moment - pathetically grateful for minimal praise

jokes.text: Well, yank my beard. This be a surprise.
jokes.setup: Amish Fry seeing his friends arrive
jokes.punchline: Amish-style exclamation with mild profanity
jokes.explanation: Good character adaptation showing Fry adopting Amish speech patterns

jokes.text: Well, yank my beard. This be a surprise.
jokes.setup: Amish Fry sees his friends visiting
jokes.punchline: Amish-style exclamation with anachronistic language
jokes.explanation: Fry adopting Amish speech patterns with characteristic enthusiasm

jokes.text: Yo, big bonnet, move your ugly but modest head covering.
jokes.setup: Bender trying to get attention through Amish woman
jokes.punchline: Insult that acknowledges modesty while being insulting
jokes.explanation: Bender's crude but oddly respectful insult fitting the Amish setting

jokes.text: She's naked but unharmed.
jokes.setup: Asked about what happened to Granny Hester
jokes.punchline: Reassures about her safety while mentioning inappropriate detail
jokes.explanation: Good uncomfortable humor with misdirection about priorities

jokes.text: You're using my own words against me. Go to hell!
jokes.setup: Robot Devil quotes Bender's robot supremacy back to him
jokes.punchline: Bender tells the devil to go to hell where he already lives
jokes.explanation: Good irony with Bender inadvertently using impossible insult

jokes.text: Run for your life, Fry! Move your ham flaps!
jokes.setup: Bender trying to warn Fry of danger
jokes.punchline: Refers to body parts as 'ham flaps'
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender terminology - crude but creative body part description

jokes.text: I'm afraid your friend is about to be fully buckminstered!
jokes.setup: Describing Fry's impending doom by bull
jokes.punchline: Made-up verb based on Buckminster Fuller's geodesic designs
jokes.explanation: Brilliant made-up word combining architect reference with violent threat

jokes.text: There's one, you rusty old dummy.
jokes.setup: Robot Devil claims no machines on Amish planet
jokes.punchline: Bender points out the Robot Devil himself is a machine
jokes.explanation: Smart plot solution with Bender's characteristic insult delivery

jokes.text: Hey, no fair. Ocupado.
jokes.setup: Bender tries to possess the Robot Devil
jokes.punchline: Devil protests possession attempt with bathroom humor
jokes.explanation: Good absurd protest with bathroom door reference

jokes.text: Well, I think the Robot Devil said he loved me in Bender's voice wearing Granny Hester's clothes.
jokes.setup: Trying to explain what just happened
jokes.punchline: Impossibly confusing description of possession chain
jokes.explanation: Excellent absurd summary that captures the ridiculous complexity

jokes.text: Well, I think the Robot Devil said he loved me in Bender's voice wearing Granny Hester's clothes.
jokes.setup: Friends ask what Fry experienced during the incident
jokes.punchline: Completely accurate but bizarre description of events
jokes.explanation: Perfectly absurd but technically accurate summary that sounds insane to others

jokes.text: You may find your victory Pyrrhic when subjected to this lyric
jokes.setup: Devil threatens eternal punishment
jokes.punchline: Rhymes 'Pyrrhic' with 'lyric' to introduce song torture
jokes.explanation: Clever rhyme that sets up musical punishment with classical reference

jokes.text: Shut up, God! Beg pardon?
jokes.setup: God welcomes Bender to Robot Heaven
jokes.punchline: Bender rudely dismisses God then awkwardly apologizes
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender moment - irreverent then immediately backtracking

jokes.text: Hey, wait, did you haunt me?
jokes.setup: Reuniting with returned Bender
jokes.punchline: Finally connects the dots about the ghostly harassment
jokes.explanation: Good callback that shows Fry's delayed realization of obvious connection

tmdb_overview: Fed up with the crew, Bender decides to kill himself using a suicide booth. After he dies, his software takes on a ghostly existence.
